suggestions.topic: Formally SFI devnet-7 EIPs following ACDE/ACDC ratification
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #88 deferred formal SFI to 'next ACDE/ACDC Thursday' (July 24/25). This call is July 23, so ratification should have occurred. ACDT should confirm SFI status and discuss any blockers if ratification was delayed.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-8 scope and timeline confirmation
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-8 targeting ~1-2 weeks from July 20 (so ~July 27-Aug 3). Should finalize EIP cleanup changes (execution gas rename, log cost consolidation in EIP-8037) and BAL JSON-RPC alignment before launch.

suggestions.topic: Devnet-7 stability check and Erigon/Grandine onboarding status
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #88 reported Erigon and Grandine being onboarded as final clients. Confirm full client participation and any remaining issues before declaring devnet-7 complete.

suggestions.topic: SSZ stable containers performance optimization plan
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #88 flagged ~10-20% performance degradation across clients at fork transition. Optimization round needed before testnet launch. Should discuss progress and timeline.

suggestions.topic: Devnet-9 chaos/non-finality testing scope and timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #88 proposed devnet-9 as non-finality chaos devnet targeting ~1 month. Should discuss specific scenarios (Death Star, malicious nodes) and whether devnet-8 results influence devnet-9 design.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7773 Glamsterdam Meta EIP Review status update
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #88 decided to move EIP-7773 to Review status with no objections. Confirm status change was completed and discuss any feedback from the community.
